items.title: Sinner gets 350th win, on to Madrid Open final
items.summary: Jannik Sinner is on to the Madrid Open final after defeating Arthur Fils 6-2, 6-4 for the top-ranked Sinner's 350th career win.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Slater puts Notts on top against Leicestershire
items.summary: Opener Ben Slater hits 178 as Nottinghamshire score 405-4 on the opening day of their Championship game against Leicestershire.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: 2026 Kentucky Derby start time: When the horses in the field will reach the starting gate for post time
items.summary: The 152nd edition of the race takes place early on Saturday evening at Churchill Downs
